NUMANodeInfo ENDS

; PCIe link information
PCIeLinkInfo STRUCT ALIGN(32)
    linkId                          DWORD ?
    linkType                        DWORD ?
    sourceDevice                    DWORD ?
    destDevice                      DWORD ?
    bandwidthGBps                   REAL4 ?
    latencyUs                       REAL4 ?
    isActive                        BYTE ?
    isPeerToPeer                    BYTE ?
    padding                         BYTE 6 DUP(?)
PCIeLinkInfo ENDS

; GPU device information
GPUDeviceInfo STRUCT ALIGN(256)
    deviceId                        DWORD ?
    deviceOrdinal                   DWORD ?
    vendorId                        DWORD ?         ; 0x10DE=NVIDIA, 0x1002=AMD, 0x8086=Intel
    deviceType                      DWORD ?         ; 0=Discrete, 1=Integrated, 2=Virtual
    
    ; Memory
    totalMemoryBytes                QWORD ?
    freeMemoryBytes                 QWORD ?
    sharedMemoryBytes               QWORD ?
    
    ; Compute
    computeCapabilityMajor          DWORD ?
    computeCapabilityMinor          DWORD ?
    multiProcessorCount             DWORD ?
    maxThreadsPerMP                 DWORD ?
    maxThreadsPerBlock              DWORD ?
    maxBlockDimX                    DWORD ?
    maxBlockDimY                    DWORD ?
    maxBlockDimZ                    DWORD ?
    maxGridDimX                     DWORD ?
    maxGridDimY                     DWORD ?
    maxGridDimZ                     DWORD ?
    maxSharedMemoryPerBlock         DWORD ?
    maxRegistersPerBlock            DWORD ?
    warpSize                        DWORD ?
    
    ; Clocks
    smClockMHz                      DWORD ?
    memoryClockMHz                  DWORD ?
    
    ; Features
    hasTensorCores                  BYTE ?
    hasRayTracing                   BYTE ?
    hasNVLink                       BYTE ?
    hasInfinityFabric               BYTE ?
    hasVideoEncode                  BYTE ?
    hasVideoDecode                  BYTE ?
    padding                         BYTE 2 DUP(?)
    
    ; PCIe
    pcieLinkWidth                   DWORD ?
    pcieLinkSpeed                   DWORD ?         ; Gen3/4/5
    pcieBandwidthGBps               REAL4 ?
    
    ; Topology
    numaNodeId                      DWORD ?
    parentBridgeId                  DWORD ?
    siblingMask                     DWORD ?         ; Bitmask of peer-accessible GPUs
    
    ; Streams
    streams                         QWORD MAX_STREAMS_PER_GPU DUP(?)
    streamCount                     DWORD ?
    currentStreamIdx                DWORD ?
    
    ; Backend handle
    hBackendContext                 QWORD ?         ; CUcontext, ID3D12Device, etc.
    
    ; Lock
    deviceLock                      SRWLOCK <>
GPUDeviceInfo ENDS

; Memory pool allocator
MemoryPool STRUCT ALIGN(128)
    poolType                        DWORD ?
    deviceId                        DWORD ?
    blockSize                       QWORD ?
    totalSize                       QWORD ?
    usedSize                        QWORD ?
    
    ; Free list (simplified)
    freeListHead                    QWORD ?
    freeListCount                   DWORD ?
    
    ; Allocation tracking
    allocations                     QWORD ?         ; AllocationRecord* array
    allocationCount                 DWORD ?
    maxAllocations                  DWORD ?
    
    ; Statistics
    totalAllocs                     QWORD ?
    totalFrees                      QWORD ?
    peakUsage                       QWORD ?
    
    ; Lock
    lock                            SRWLOCK <>
MemoryPool ENDS

; Multi-GPU scheduler context
MultiGPUScheduler STRUCT ALIGN(512)
    magic                           DWORD ?         ; 'MULTI'
    version                         DWORD ?
    
    ; Devices
    devices                         QWORD ?         ; GPUDeviceInfo* array
    deviceCount                     DWORD ?
    maxDevices                      DWORD ?
    
    ; Scheduling
    schedulingPolicy                DWORD ?         ; 0=Round-robin, 1=Load-balanced, 2=Affinity-based
    currentDeviceIdx                DWORD ?
    
    ; Load tracking
    deviceLoad                      DWORD MAX_GPU_DEVICES DUP(?)  ; 0-100 load percentage
    deviceQueueDepth                DWORD MAX_GPU_DEVICES DUP(?)
    
    ; Topology
    pcieLinks                       QWORD ?         ; PCIeLinkInfo* array
    linkCount                       DWORD ?
    
    ; NUMA
    numaNodes                       QWORD ?         ; NUMANodeInfo* array
    numaNodeCount                   DWORD ?
    
    ; Global lock
    schedulerLock                   SRWLOCK <>
MultiGPUScheduler ENDS

; Synchronization primitive wrapper
SyncPrimitive STRUCT ALIGN(64)
    primitiveType                   DWORD ?         ; Event, Semaphore, Fence, Barrier
    hHandle                         QWORD ?         ; OS handle or GPU handle
    
    ; GPU-specific
    hGpuEvent                       QWORD ?         ; CUevent, VkEvent, etc.
    hGpuFence                       QWORD ?         ; ID3D12Fence, etc.
    fenceValue                      QWORD ?
    
    ; State
    isSignaled                      BYTE ?
    isAutoReset                     BYTE ?
    padding                         BYTE 6 DUP(?)
    
    ; Statistics
    signalCount                     QWORD ?
    waitCount                       QWORD ?
    totalWaitTimeNs                 QWORD ?
SyncPrimitive ENDS

; Command buffer (for batching GPU commands)
CommandBuffer STRUCT ALIGN(256)
    bufferType                      DWORD ?         ; 0=Graphics, 1=Compute, 2=Copy, 3=DMA
    deviceId                        DWORD ?
    
    ; Buffer storage
    pCommands                       QWORD ?         ; Command* array
    commandCount                    DWORD ?
    maxCommands                     DWORD ?
    bufferSizeBytes                 QWORD ?
    
    ; State
    isRecording                     BYTE ?
    isExecutable                    BYTE ?
    isSubmitted                     BYTE ?
    padding                         BYTE 5 DUP(?)
    
    ; GPU handles
    hCommandBuffer                  QWORD ?         ; VkCommandBuffer, ID3D12GraphicsCommandList, etc.
    hCommandPool                    QWORD ?         ; VkCommandPool, ID3D12CommandAllocator, etc.
    
    ; Dependencies
    waitPrimitives                  QWORD ?         ; SyncPrimitive* array
    waitCount                       DWORD ?
    signalPrimitive                 QWORD ?         ; SyncPrimitive to signal on completion
    
    ; Performance
    submitTimeNs                    QWORD ?
    completionTimeNs                QWORD ?
CommandBuffer ENDS

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; GLOBAL DATA
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
.data
align 4096

; Performance counters (cache-line aligned)
g_PerformanceCounters             PerformanceCounters <>

; QPC Frequency
g_QPFrequency                     QWORD 0

; Multi-GPU scheduler
g_pMultiGPUScheduler              QWORD 0

; Memory pools
g_MemoryPools                     QWORD 0         ; MemoryPool* array
g_MemoryPoolCount                 DWORD 0

; NUMA topology
g_NumaTopology                    QWORD 0         ; NUMA topology handle
g_NumaNodeCount                   DWORD 0

; Error strings
szErrorNullContext                BYTE "Null context pointer", 0
szErrorInvalidBatchSize           BYTE "Invalid batch size", 0
szErrorOutOfMemory                BYTE "Out of memory", 0
szErrorDependencyCycle            BYTE "Dependency cycle detected", 0
szErrorDeviceLost                 BYTE "GPU device lost", 0
szErrorTimeout                    BYTE "Operation timeout", 0

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CODE SECTION
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
.code

;==============================================================================
; SECTION 1: PERFORMANCE COUNTERS (COMPLETE IMPLEMENTATION)
;==============================================================================

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PerformanceCounter_Initialize - Initialize global counters
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
PerformanceCounter_Initialize PROC FRAME
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    ; Zero all counters
    mov rcx, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, sizeof PerformanceCounters
    call memset
    
    ; Initialize global lock
    mov rcx, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters.globalLock
    call InitializeSRWLock
    
    ; Query QPC frequency
    lea rcx, g_QPFrequency
    call QueryPerformanceFrequency
    
    ; Record initialization time
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    mov g_PerformanceCounters.initializationTime, rax
    mov g_PerformanceCounters.lastResetTime, rax
    
    mov eax, 1
    
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
PerformanceCounter_Initialize ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs - Get timestamp in nanoseconds
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs PROC FRAME
    LOCAL qpcCount:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    ; Query performance counter
    lea rcx, qpcCount
    call QueryPerformanceCounter
    
    ; Convert to nanoseconds: (count * 1,000,000,000) / frequency
    mov rax, qpcCount
    mov rcx, 1000000000               ; 1 second in nanoseconds
    mul rcx                           ; RDX:RAX = count * 1e9
    
    ; Divide by frequency
    mov rcx, g_QPFrequency
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @@avoid_div_zero
    
    div rcx                           ; RAX = nanoseconds
    
    jmp @@done
    
@@avoid_div_zero:
    ; Fallback to microseconds * 1000
    mov rax, qpcCount
    mov rcx, 1000000
    mul rcx
    mov rcx, g_QPFrequency
    shr rcx, 10                       ; Approximate
    test rcx, rcx
    jnz @@div_approx
    mov rcx, 1
@@div_approx:
    div rcx
    imul rax, 1000                    ; Convert to nanoseconds (approximate)
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PerformanceCounter_Record - Record an event with timing
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
PerformanceCounter_Record PROC FRAME counterId:DWORD, durationNs:QWORD
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 48
    
    mov ebx, counterId
    mov rsi, durationNs
    
    ; Validate counter ID
    cmp ebx, PERF_COUNTER_MAX
    jae @@invalid_id
    
    ; Get counter pointer
    mov rax, sizeof PerformanceCounter
    mul ebx
    lea rcx, g_PerformanceCounters.counters
    add rcx, rax
    
    ; Atomic increment count
    lock inc QWORD PTR [rcx].PerformanceCounter.count
    
    ; Add to total time
    lock add QWORD PTR [rcx].PerformanceCounter.totalTimeNs, rsi
    
    ; Update min time (atomic compare-and-swap loop)
@@update_min:
    mov rax, [rcx].PerformanceCounter.minTimeNs
    test rax, rax
    jz @@set_min                      ; First entry
    cmp rsi, rax
    jae @@check_max
@@set_min:
    ; Try to update min
    lock cmpxchg QWORD PTR [rcx].PerformanceCounter.minTimeNs, rsi
    jne @@update_min
    
@@check_max:
    ; Update max time
@@update_max:
    mov rax, [rcx].PerformanceCounter.maxTimeNs
    cmp rsi, rax
    jbe @@update_last
    lock cmpxchg QWORD PTR [rcx].PerformanceCounter.maxTimeNs, rsi
    jne @@update_max
    
@@update_last:
    ; Store last time
    mov [rcx].PerformanceCounter.lastTimeNs, rsi
    
@@invalid_id:
    add rsp, 48
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
PerformanceCounter_Record ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Titan_GetPerformanceCounters - Thread-safe counter read
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
Titan_GetPerformanceCounters PROC FRAME pCounters:QWORD
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 32
    
    mov rbx, pCounters
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error_null
    
    ; Acquire read lock
    mov rcx, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters.globalLock
    call AcquireSRWLockShared
    
    ; Copy global stats
    mov rsi, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters.totalKernelsSubmitted
    mov rdi, rbx
    
    ; Copy all QWORD stats
    mov rcx, 10                       ; 10 QWORD fields
    rep movsq
    
    ; Copy individual counters
    lea rsi, g_PerformanceCounters.counters
    add rdi, 80                       ; Skip global stats (10 * 8 bytes)
    mov rcx, (sizeof PerformanceCounter * PERF_COUNTER_MAX) / 8
    rep movsq
    
    ; Release lock
    mov rcx, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters.globalLock
    call ReleaseSRWLockShared
    
    mov eax, 0                        ; Success
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_null:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 32
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Titan_GetPerformanceCounters ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Titan_ResetPerformanceCounters - Reset all counters
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
Titan_ResetPerformanceCounters PROC FRAME
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    ; Acquire exclusive lock
    mov rcx, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters.globalLock
    call AcquireSRWLockExclusive
    
    ; Save initialization time
    mov rbx, g_PerformanceCounters.initializationTime
    
    ; Zero all counters
    mov rcx, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, sizeof PerformanceCounters
    call memset
    
    ; Restore initialization time and set last reset
    mov g_PerformanceCounters.initializationTime, rbx
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    mov g_PerformanceCounters.lastResetTime, rax
    
    ; Reinitialize lock (must do after memset)
    mov rcx, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters.globalLock
    call InitializeSRWLock
    
    ; Release lock
    mov rcx, OFFSET g_PerformanceCounters.globalLock
    call ReleaseSRWLockExclusive
    
    xor eax, eax
    
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
Titan_ResetPerformanceCounters ENDP

;==============================================================================
; SECTION 2: SYNCHRONIZATION PRIMITIVES (COMPLETE IMPLEMENTATION)
;==============================================================================

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Titan_SynchronizeOperation - Wait for operation with timeout
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
Titan_SynchronizeOperation PROC FRAME hEvent:QWORD, timeoutMs:DWORD, syncMode:DWORD
    LOCAL startTime:QWORD
    LOCAL waitResult:DWORD
    LOCAL spinCount:DWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    sub rsp, 64
    
    mov rbx, hEvent
    mov esi, timeoutMs
    mov edi, syncMode
    
    ; Validate event
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error_null_event
    
    ; Record start time
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    mov startTime, rax
    
    ; Choose synchronization strategy
    cmp edi, SYNC_MODE_SPIN
    je @@spin_wait
    cmp edi, SYNC_MODE_YIELD
    je @@yield_wait
    cmp edi, SYNC_MODE_INTERRUPT
    je @@interrupt_wait
    
    ; Default: Event-based wait
    jmp @@event_wait
    
@@spin_wait:
    ; Spin-wait with exponential backoff
    mov spinCount, 1
    
@@spin_loop:
    ; Check if event is signaled (non-blocking)
    mov rcx, rbx
    mov edx, 0                        ; No wait
    call WaitForSingleObject
    
    cmp eax, WAIT_OBJECT_0
    je @@success
    
    ; Spin
    mov ecx, spinCount
@@spin_inner:
    pause                             ; Hint to CPU we're spinning
    loop @@spin_inner
    
    ; Exponential backoff (max 1024 iterations)
    shl spinCount, 1
    cmp spinCount, 1024
    jle @@spin_loop
    mov spinCount, 1024
    jmp @@spin_loop
    
@@yield_wait:
    ; Yield-based wait
@@yield_loop:
    mov rcx, rbx
    mov edx, 0
    call WaitForSingleObject
    
    cmp eax, WAIT_OBJECT_0
    je @@success
    
    ; Yield and retry
    mov ecx, 0
    call SwitchToThread
    jmp @@yield_loop
    
@@interrupt_wait:
    ; Interrupt-driven (would use I/O completion ports)
    ; For now, fall through to event wait
    
@@event_wait:
    ; Standard event wait with timeout
    mov rcx, rbx
    mov edx, esi
    call WaitForSingleObject
    mov waitResult, eax
    
    cmp eax, WAIT_OBJECT_0
    je @@success
    
    cmp eax, WAIT_TIMEOUT
    je @@timeout
    
    ; Other error
    jmp @@error_wait
    
@@success:
    ; Record sync wait performance
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    sub rax, startTime
    
    mov ecx, PERF_COUNTER_SYNC_WAIT
    mov rdx, rax
    call PerformanceCounter_Record
    
    lock inc g_PerformanceCounters.totalSyncWaits
    
    xor eax, eax                      ; Success
    jmp @@done
    
@@timeout:
    mov eax, 1                        ; Timeout
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_wait:
    mov eax, 2                        ; Error
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 64
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
    
@@error_null_event:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE
    jmp @@done
Titan_SynchronizeOperation ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; SyncPrimitive_Create - Create synchronization primitive
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
SyncPrimitive_Create PROC FRAME primitiveType:DWORD, isAutoReset:BYTE
    LOCAL pPrimitive:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 48
    
    mov ebx, primitiveType
    mov sil, isAutoReset
    
    ; Allocate primitive
    mov ecx, sizeof SyncPrimitive
    call malloc
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_alloc
    mov pPrimitive, rax
    
    ; Zero initialize
    mov rcx, rax
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, sizeof SyncPrimitive
    call memset
    
    ; Setup type
    mov rax, pPrimitive
    mov [rax].SyncPrimitive.primitiveType, ebx
    mov [rax].SyncPrimitive.isAutoReset, sil
    
    ; Create based on type
    cmp ebx, 0                        ; Event
    je @@create_event
    cmp ebx, 1                        ; Semaphore
    je @@create_semaphore
    cmp ebx, 2                        ; Mutex
    je @@create_mutex
    jmp @@error_invalid_type
    
@@create_event:
    xor ecx, ecx                      ; Security attributes
    movzx edx, sil                    ; Manual reset (FALSE = auto-reset)
    xor r8d, r8d                      ; Initial state
    xor r9d, r9d                      ; Name
    call CreateEventW
    mov rdx, pPrimitive
    mov [rdx].SyncPrimitive.hHandle, rax
    jmp @@created
    
@@create_semaphore:
    xor ecx, ecx
    xor edx, edx                      ; Initial count
    mov r8d, 1                        ; Maximum count
    xor r9d, r9d
    call CreateSemaphoreW
    mov rdx, pPrimitive
    mov [rdx].SyncPrimitive.hHandle, rax
    jmp @@created
    
@@create_mutex:
    xor ecx, ecx
    xor edx, edx                      ; Initial owner
    xor r8d, r8d                      ; Name
    call CreateMutexW
    mov rdx, pPrimitive
    mov [rdx].SyncPrimitive.hHandle, rax
    
@@created:
    mov rax, pPrimitive
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_invalid_type:
    mov rcx, pPrimitive
    call free
    
@@error_alloc:
    xor eax, eax
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 48
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
SyncPrimitive_Create ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; SyncPrimitive_Destroy - Destroy synchronization primitive
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
SyncPrimitive_Destroy PROC FRAME pPrimitive:QWORD
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    mov rbx, pPrimitive
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@done
    
    ; Close handle
    mov rcx, [rbx].SyncPrimitive.hHandle
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @@skip_close
    call CloseHandle
    
@@skip_close:
    ; Free structure
    mov rcx, rbx
    call free
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
SyncPrimitive_Destroy ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; SyncPrimitive_Signal - Signal primitive
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
SyncPrimitive_Signal PROC FRAME pPrimitive:QWORD
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    mov rbx, pPrimitive
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error
    
    ; Record signal
    lock inc [rbx].SyncPrimitive.signalCount
    
    ; Signal based on type
    mov eax, [rbx].SyncPrimitive.primitiveType
    
    cmp eax, 0                        ; Event
    je @@signal_event
    cmp eax, 1                        ; Semaphore
    je @@signal_semaphore
    cmp eax, 2                        ; Mutex (release)
    je @@release_mutex
    jmp @@error
    
@@signal_event:
    mov rcx, [rbx].SyncPrimitive.hHandle
    call SetEvent
    jmp @@success
    
@@signal_semaphore:
    mov rcx, [rbx].SyncPrimitive.hHandle
    mov edx, 1                        ; Release count
    xor r8d, r8d                      ; Previous count (don't care)
    call ReleaseSemaphore
    jmp @@success
    
@@release_mutex:
    mov rcx, [rbx].SyncPrimitive.hHandle
    call ReleaseMutex
    
@@success:
    mov [rbx].SyncPrimitive.isSignaled, 1
    xor eax, eax
    jmp @@done
    
@@error:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
SyncPrimitive_Signal ENDP

;==============================================================================
; SECTION 3: BATCH KERNEL EXECUTION (COMPLETE IMPLEMENTATION)
;==============================================================================

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; BatchKernelContext_Create - Create batch execution context
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
BatchKernelContext_Create PROC FRAME maxKernels:DWORD, flags:DWORD, timeoutMs:DWORD
    LOCAL pContext:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    sub rsp, 64
    
    mov ebx, maxKernels
    mov esi, flags
    mov edi, timeoutMs
    
    ; Validate
    test ebx, ebx
    jz @@error_invalid_size
    cmp ebx, MAX_BATCH_KERNELS
    ja @@error_invalid_size
    
    ; Allocate context
    mov ecx, sizeof BatchKernelContext
    call malloc
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_alloc
    mov pContext, rax
    
    ; Zero initialize
    mov rcx, rax
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, sizeof BatchKernelContext
    call memset
    
    ; Setup header
    mov rax, pContext
    mov [rax].BatchKernelContext.magic, 'BATCH'
    mov [rax].BatchKernelContext.version, 0100h
    mov [rax].BatchKernelContext.flags, esi
    mov [rax].BatchKernelContext.timeoutMs, edi
    
    ; Allocate kernel array
    mov ecx, ebx
    imul ecx, sizeof GPU_KERNEL_DESCRIPTOR
    call malloc
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_kernel_alloc
    
    mov rdx, pContext
    mov [rdx].BatchKernelContext.kernelArray, rax
    mov [rdx].BatchKernelContext.maxKernels, ebx
    
    ; Allocate dependency graph
    mov ecx, ebx
    imul ecx, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    call malloc
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_dep_alloc
    
    mov rdx, pContext
    mov [rdx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph, rax
    
    ; Allocate results array
    mov ecx, ebx
    imul ecx, 4                       ; sizeof DWORD
    call malloc
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_result_alloc
    
    mov rdx, pContext
    mov [rdx].BatchKernelContext.results, rax
    
    ; Create completion event
    xor ecx, ecx
    xor edx, edx
    xor r8d, r8d
    xor r9d, r9d
    call CreateEventW
    
    mov rdx, pContext
    mov [rdx].BatchKernelContext.hCompletionEvent, rax
    
    ; Create progress event (manual reset for multiple waits)
    xor ecx, ecx
    mov edx, 1                        ; Manual reset
    xor r8d, r8d
    xor r9d, r9d
    call CreateEventW
    
    mov rdx, pContext
    mov [rdx].BatchKernelContext.hProgressEvent, rax
    
    ; Initialize lock
    mov rcx, pContext
    add rcx, OFFSET BatchKernelContext.lock
    call InitializeSRWLock
    
    mov rax, pContext
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_result_alloc:
    mov rcx, pContext
    mov rcx, [rcx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    call free
    
@@error_dep_alloc:
    mov rcx, pContext
    mov rcx, [rcx].BatchKernelContext.kernelArray
    call free
    
@@error_kernel_alloc:
    mov rcx, pContext
    call free
    
@@error_alloc:
@@error_invalid_size:
    xor eax, eax
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 64
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
BatchKernelContext_Create ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; BatchKernelContext_Destroy - Cleanup batch context
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
BatchKernelContext_Destroy PROC FRAME pContext:QWORD
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 32
    
    mov rbx, pContext
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@done
    
    ; Validate magic
    cmp [rbx].BatchKernelContext.magic, 'BATCH'
    jne @@done
    
    ; Close events
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hCompletionEvent
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @@skip_event1
    call CloseHandle
    
@@skip_event1:
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hProgressEvent
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @@skip_event2
    call CloseHandle
    
@@skip_event2:
    ; Free arrays
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelArray
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @@skip_kernels
    call free
    
@@skip_kernels:
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @@skip_deps
    call free
    
@@skip_deps:
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.results
    test rcx, rcx
    jz @@skip_results
    call free
    
@@skip_results:
    ; Free context
    mov rcx, rbx
    call free
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 32
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
BatchKernelContext_Destroy ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; BatchKernelContext_AddKernel - Add kernel to batch
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
BatchKernelContext_AddKernel PROC FRAME pContext:QWORD, pKernelDesc:QWORD, pDependencies:QWORD, depCount:DWORD
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    push r12
    sub rsp, 48
    
    mov rbx, pContext
    mov rsi, pKernelDesc
    mov rdi, pDependencies
    mov r12d, depCount
    
    ; Validate
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error_null_context
    test rsi, rsi
    jz @@error_null_kernel
    
    ; Check capacity
    mov eax, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    cmp eax, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.maxKernels
    jae @@error_full
    
    ; Copy kernel descriptor
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelArray
    mov edx, eax
    imul edx, sizeof GPU_KERNEL_DESCRIPTOR
    add rcx, rdx
    
    push rsi
    push rdi
    mov rdi, rcx
    mov ecx, sizeof GPU_KERNEL_DESCRIPTOR / 8
    rep movsq
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    
    ; Setup dependency node
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    mov edx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    imul edx, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    add rcx, rdx
    
    mov [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.kernelIndex, eax
    mov [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.status, 0      ; Pending
    
    ; Create completion event for this kernel
    xor ecx, ecx
    xor edx, edx
    xor r8d, r8d
    xor r9d, r9d
    call CreateEventW
    mov [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.hEvent, rax
    
    ; Copy dependencies
    test rdi, rdi
    jz @@no_deps
    test r12d, r12d
    jz @@no_deps
    
    cmp r12d, MAX_DEPENDENCIES_PER_KERNEL
    cmova r12d, MAX_DEPENDENCIES_PER_KERNEL
    
    mov [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.dependencyCount, r12d
    
    ; Copy dependency indices
    xor edx, edx
@@dep_loop:
    cmp edx, r12d
    jge @@deps_done
    
    mov eax, [rdi + rdx * 4]
    mov [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.dependencies[rdx * 4], eax
    
    inc edx
    jmp @@dep_loop
    
@@deps_done:
    mov [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hasDependencies, 1
    
@@no_deps:
    ; Increment count
    inc [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    
    xor eax, eax                      ; Success
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_full:
    mov eax, ERROR_NOT_ENOUGH_MEMORY
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_null_kernel:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_null_context:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 48
    pop r12
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
BatchKernelContext_AddKernel ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; BatchKernelContext_BuildDependencyGraph - Build reverse dependencies
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
BatchKernelContext_BuildDependencyGraph PROC FRAME pContext:QWORD
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    push r12
    push r13
    sub rsp, 48
    
    mov rbx, pContext
    
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error
    
    cmp [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hasDependencies, 0
    je @@done
    
    ; For each kernel, find its dependents
    xor r12d, r12d                    ; Current kernel index
    
@@outer_loop:
    cmp r12d, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    jge @@done
    
    ; Get this kernel's node
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    mov edx, r12d
    imul edx, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    lea rsi, [rcx + rdx]
    
    ; For each of its dependencies
    xor r13d, r13d                    ; Dependency index
    
@@dep_loop:
    cmp r13d, [rsi].KernelDependencyNode.dependencyCount
    jge @@next_kernel
    
    ; Get the prerequisite kernel index
    mov edi, [rsi].KernelDependencyNode.dependencies[r13d * 4]
    
    ; Validate dependency index
    cmp edi, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    jae @@invalid_dep
    
    ; Get the prerequisite's node
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    mov edx, edi
    imul edx, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    lea rdi, [rcx + rdx]
    
    ; Add this kernel as a dependent
    mov eax, [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.dependentCount
    cmp eax, MAX_DEPENDENCIES_PER_KERNEL
    jae @@dep_overflow
    
    mov [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.dependents[eax * 4], r12d
    inc [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.dependentCount
    
    inc r13d
    jmp @@dep_loop
    
@@invalid_dep:
@@dep_overflow:
    inc r13d
    jmp @@dep_loop
    
@@next_kernel:
    inc r12d
    jmp @@outer_loop
    
@@done:
    xor eax, eax
    jmp @@cleanup
    
@@error:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE
    
@@cleanup:
    add rsp, 48
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
BatchKernelContext_BuildDependencyGraph ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; BatchKernelContext_DetectCycle - Detect dependency cycles using DFS
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
BatchKernelContext_DetectCycle PROC FRAME pContext:QWORD
    LOCAL visited:BYTE MAX_BATCH_KERNELS DUP(?)   ; 0=unvisited, 1=visiting, 2=visited
    LOCAL recursionStack:BYTE MAX_BATCH_KERNELS DUP(?)
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    push r12
    sub rsp, 512                      ; Local arrays
    
    mov rbx, pContext
    
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error
    
    ; Initialize arrays
    lea rcx, visited
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, MAX_BATCH_KERNELS
    call memset
    
    lea rcx, recursionStack
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, MAX_BATCH_KERNELS
    call memset
    
    ; DFS from each unvisited node
    xor r12d, r12d
    
@@dfs_loop:
    cmp r12d, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    jge @@no_cycle
    
    cmp BYTE PTR [rsp + r12], 0       ; Check visited array
    jne @@next_node
    
    ; Start DFS from this node
    mov ecx, r12d
    lea rdx, visited
    lea r8, recursionStack
    call @@dfs_visit
    
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@cycle_found
    
@@next_node:
    inc r12d
    jmp @@dfs_loop
    
@@no_cycle:
    xor eax, eax                      ; No cycle
    jmp @@done
    
@@cycle_found:
    mov eax, 1                        ; Cycle detected
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 512
    pop r12
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
    
@@error:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE
    add rsp, 512
    pop r12
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; DFS visit helper
; RCX = node index
; RDX = visited array
; R8  = recursion stack array
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
@@dfs_visit:
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    push r12
    push r13
    
    mov r12d, ecx                     ; Current node
    mov rbx, rdx                      ; Visited array
    mov rsi, r8                       ; Recursion stack
    
    ; Mark as visiting
    mov BYTE PTR [rbx + r12], 1
    mov BYTE PTR [rsi + r12], 1
    
    ; Get node pointer
    mov rax, g_pBatchContext          ; Would need to pass this
    mov rcx, [rax].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    mov edx, r12d
    imul edx, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    lea rdi, [rcx + rdx]
    
    ; Visit all dependents
    xor r13d, r13d
    
@@visit_loop:
    cmp r13d, [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.dependentCount
    jge @@visit_done
    
    mov eax, [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.dependents[r13d * 4]
    
    ; Check if in recursion stack (cycle)
    cmp BYTE PTR [rsi + rax], 1
    je @@found_cycle
    
    ; Check if unvisited
    cmp BYTE PTR [rbx + rax], 0
    jne @@next_dependent
    
    ; Recurse
    mov ecx, eax
    mov rdx, rbx
    mov r8, rsi
    call @@dfs_visit
    
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@found_cycle
    
@@next_dependent:
    inc r13d
    jmp @@visit_loop
    
@@visit_done:
    ; Mark as visited
    mov BYTE PTR [rbx + r12], 2
    mov BYTE PTR [rsi + r12], 0
    
    xor eax, eax
    jmp @@visit_return
    
@@found_cycle:
    mov eax, 1
    
@@visit_return:
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret

BatchKernelContext_DetectCycle ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Titan_ExecuteBatchKernels - Execute batch of kernels with dependencies
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
Titan_ExecuteBatchKernels PROC FRAME pContext:QWORD, hExternalEvent:QWORD
    LOCAL pContextLocal:QWORD
    LOCAL startTime:QWORD
    LOCAL completedKernels:DWORD
    LOCAL kernelIdx:DWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    push r12
    push r13
    sub rsp, 128
    
    mov rbx, pContext
    mov r12, hExternalEvent
    
    ; Validate
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error_null_context
    
    cmp [rbx].BatchKernelContext.magic, 'BATCH'
    jne @@error_invalid_magic
    
    ; Check if already executing
    cmp [rbx].BatchKernelContext.runningCount, 0
    jne @@error_already_running
    
    ; Build dependency graph
    mov rcx, rbx
    call BatchKernelContext_BuildDependencyGraph
    
    ; Detect cycles
    mov rcx, rbx
    call BatchKernelContext_DetectCycle
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@error_cycle
    
    ; Record submit time
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    mov startTime, rax
    mov [rbx].BatchKernelContext.submitTimeNs, rax
    
    ; Reset events
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hCompletionEvent
    call ResetEvent
    
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hProgressEvent
    call ResetEvent
    
    ; Reset kernel statuses
    xor esi, esi
@@reset_loop:
    cmp esi, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    jge @@reset_done
    
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    mov edx, esi
    imul edx, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    add rcx, rdx
    
    mov [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.status, 0      ; Pending
    
    ; Reset individual event
    push rcx
    mov rcx, [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.hEvent
    call ResetEvent
    pop rcx
    
    inc esi
    jmp @@reset_loop
    
@@reset_done:
    ; Acquire exclusive lock
    mov rcx, rbx
    add rcx, OFFSET BatchKernelContext.lock
    call AcquireSRWLockExclusive
    
    ; Initialize execution state
    mov [rbx].BatchKernelContext.completedCount, 0
    mov [rbx].BatchKernelContext.failedCount, 0
    mov [rbx].BatchKernelContext.runningCount, 0
    
    ; Determine execution strategy
    mov eax, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.flags
    test eax, BATCH_FLAG_SEQUENTIAL
    jnz @@execute_sequential
    test eax, BATCH_FLAG_PIPELINE
    jnz @@execute_pipeline
    
    ; Default: parallel with dependency resolution
    jmp @@execute_parallel
    
@@execute_sequential:
    ; Execute kernels in order (ignore dependencies)
    xor esi, esi
    
@@seq_loop:
    cmp esi, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    jge @@execution_complete
    
    ; Get kernel descriptor
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelArray
    mov edx, esi
    imul edx, sizeof GPU_KERNEL_DESCRIPTOR
    lea rdi, [rcx + rdx]
    
    ; Execute kernel
    mov rcx, rdi
    xor edx, edx                      ; No result buffer for batch
    xor r8d, r8d
    call Titan_ExecuteComputeKernel
    
    ; Store result
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.results
    mov [rcx + rsi * 4], eax
    
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@seq_failed
    
    ; Update node status
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    mov edx, esi
    imul edx, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    add rcx, rdx
    
    mov [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.status, 3      ; Complete
    
    inc [rbx].BatchKernelContext.completedCount
    
    ; Signal progress
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hProgressEvent
    call SetEvent
    
    inc esi
    jmp @@seq_loop
    
@@seq_failed:
    inc [rbx].BatchKernelContext.failedCount
    
    cmp [rbx].BatchKernelContext.errorMode, ERROR_MODE_STOP
    je @@execution_complete
    
    inc esi
    jmp @@seq_loop
    
@@execute_parallel:
    ; Execute kernels respecting dependencies
    ; This is the complex scheduler
    
@@scheduler_loop:
    ; Find ready kernels (all dependencies satisfied)
    xor esi, esi
    xor r13d, r13d                    ; Found ready kernel flag
    
@@find_ready:
    cmp esi, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    jge @@check_progress
    
    ; Get node
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    mov edx, esi
    imul edx, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    lea rdi, [rcx + rdx]
    
    ; Check if pending
    cmp [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.status, 0
    jne @@next_find
    
    ; Check if all dependencies satisfied
    mov r12d, [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.dependencyCount
    test r12d, r12d
    jz @@kernel_ready                 ; No dependencies
    
    ; Check each dependency
    xor edx, edx
@@check_dep:
    cmp edx, r12d
    jge @@kernel_ready
    
    mov eax, [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.dependencies[rdx * 4]
    
    ; Get dependency node status
    push rcx
    push rdx
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.dependencyGraph
    imul eax, sizeof KernelDependencyNode
    add rcx, rax
    
    cmp [rcx].KernelDependencyNode.status, 3      ; Complete?
    pop rdx
    pop rcx
    jne @@next_find                   ; Dependency not satisfied
    
    inc edx
    jmp @@check_dep
    
@@kernel_ready:
    ; Launch this kernel
    mov [rdi].KernelDependencyNode.status, 2      ; Running
    inc [rbx].BatchKernelContext.runningCount
    
    ; Get kernel descriptor
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelArray
    imul esi, sizeof GPU_KERNEL_DESCRIPTOR
    add rcx, rsi
    
    ; Execute (would use async launch in real impl)
    push rdi
    push rsi
    mov rdx, rdi                      ; Node for callback
    mov r8d, esi                      ; Kernel index
    call Titan_ExecuteComputeKernelAsync  ; Would be async version
    pop rsi
    pop rdi
    
    mov r13d, 1                       ; Found at least one ready kernel
    
@@next_find:
    inc esi
    jmp @@find_ready
    
@@check_progress:
    ; Check if all complete
    mov eax, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.completedCount
    add eax, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.failedCount
    cmp eax, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.kernelCount
    jge @@execution_complete
    
    ; If no ready kernels found but still running, wait
    cmp r13d, 0
    je @@wait_for_completion
    
    ; Continue scheduling
    jmp @@scheduler_loop
    
@@wait_for_completion:
    ; Wait for at least one kernel to complete
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hProgressEvent
    mov edx, 100                      ; 100ms timeout
    call WaitForSingleObject
    
    cmp eax, WAIT_OBJECT_0
    je @@scheduler_loop               ; Progress made
    
    cmp eax, WAIT_TIMEOUT
    je @@check_timeout
    
    ; Error
    jmp @@execution_complete
    
@@check_timeout:
    ; Check if we've exceeded total timeout
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    sub rax, startTime
    mov rcx, 1000000                  ; Convert ms to ns
    mov edx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.timeoutMs
    mul rdx
    
    cmp rax, rdx
    ja @@error_timeout
    
    jmp @@scheduler_loop
    
@@execute_pipeline:
    ; Pipeline execution mode (for dataflow patterns)
    jmp @@execute_parallel            ; Simplified - same as parallel for now
    
@@execution_complete:
    ; Record completion time
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    mov [rbx].BatchKernelContext.completionTimeNs, rax
    
    sub rax, startTime
    mov [rbx].BatchKernelContext.totalExecutionTimeNs, rax
    
    ; Update performance counters
    mov ecx, PERF_COUNTER_BATCH_SUBMIT
    mov rdx, startTime
    call PerformanceCounter_Record
    
    lock inc g_PerformanceCounters.totalBatchesSubmitted
    lock inc g_PerformanceCounters.totalBatchesCompleted
    
    ; Signal external event if provided
    test r12, r12
    jz @@signal_internal
    
    mov rcx, r12
    call SetEvent
    
@@signal_internal:
    mov rcx, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.hCompletionEvent
    call SetEvent
    
    ; Release lock
    mov rcx, rbx
    add rcx, OFFSET BatchKernelContext.lock
    call ReleaseSRWLockExclusive
    
    ; Return success count
    mov eax, [rbx].BatchKernelContext.completedCount
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_null_context:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_invalid_magic:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_DATA
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_already_running:
    mov eax, ERROR_BUSY
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_cycle:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER  ; Would use specific cycle error
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_timeout:
    mov eax, ERROR_TIMEOUT
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 128
    pop r13
    pop r12
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Titan_ExecuteBatchKernels ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Titan_ExecuteComputeKernelAsync - Async kernel launch (placeholder for real async)
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
Titan_ExecuteComputeKernelAsync PROC FRAME pKernelDesc:QWORD, pNode:QWORD, kernelIdx:DWORD
    ; In real implementation, this would:
    ; 1. Launch kernel asynchronously
    ; 2. Set up completion callback
    ; 3. Return immediately
    
    ; For now, just call sync version and signal completion
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 32
    
    mov rbx, pKernelDesc
    mov rsi, pNode
    
    ; Execute synchronously
    mov rcx, rbx
    xor edx, edx
    xor r8d, r8d
    call Titan_ExecuteComputeKernel
    
    ; Mark complete
    mov [rsi].KernelDependencyNode.status, 3
    
    ; Record execution time
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    mov [rsi].KernelDependencyNode.executionTimeNs, rax
    
    ; Signal completion
    mov rcx, [rsi].KernelDependencyNode.hEvent
    call SetEvent
    
    add rsp, 32
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Titan_ExecuteComputeKernelAsync ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; MultiGPUScheduler_Create - Initialize multi-GPU scheduler
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
MultiGPUScheduler_Create PROC FRAME schedulingPolicy:DWORD
    LOCAL pScheduler:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 48
    
    mov esi, schedulingPolicy
    
    ; Allocate scheduler
    mov ecx, sizeof MultiGPUScheduler
    call malloc
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_alloc
    mov pScheduler, rax
    
    ; Zero initialize
    mov rcx, rax
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, sizeof MultiGPUScheduler
    call memset
    
    ; Setup header
    mov rax, pScheduler
    mov [rax].MultiGPUScheduler.magic, 'MULTI'
    mov [rax].MultiGPUScheduler.version, 0100h
    mov [rax].MultiGPUScheduler.schedulingPolicy, esi
    
    ; Initialize lock
    mov rcx, pScheduler
    add rcx, OFFSET MultiGPUScheduler.schedulerLock
    call InitializeSRWLock
    
    ; Detect GPUs
    mov rcx, pScheduler
    call MultiGPUScheduler_DetectGPUs
    
    ; Detect topology
    mov rcx, pScheduler
    call MultiGPUScheduler_DetectTopology
    
    mov g_pMultiGPUScheduler, pScheduler
    mov rax, pScheduler
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_alloc:
    xor eax, eax
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 48
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
MultiGPUScheduler_Create ENDP

MultiGPUScheduler_DetectTopology ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; MultiGPUScheduler_SelectDevice - Select best device for workload
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
MultiGPUScheduler_SelectDevice PROC FRAME pScheduler:QWORD, workloadSize:QWORD, preferredDevice:DWORD
    push rbx
    push rsi
    sub rsp, 48
    
    mov rbx, pScheduler
    mov rsi, workloadSize
    
    ; Acquire read lock
    mov rcx, rbx
    add rcx, OFFSET MultiGPUScheduler.schedulerLock
    call AcquireSRWLockShared
    
    ; Simple round-robin for now
    mov eax, [rbx].MultiGPUScheduler.currentDeviceIdx
    inc eax
    cmp eax, [rbx].MultiGPUScheduler.deviceCount
    jl @@store_idx
    xor eax, eax
@@store_idx:
    mov [rbx].MultiGPUScheduler.currentDeviceIdx, eax
    
    ; Release lock
    mov rcx, rbx
    add rcx, OFFSET MultiGPUScheduler.schedulerLock
    call ReleaseSRWLockShared
    
    add rsp, 48
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
MultiGPUScheduler_SelectDevice ENDP

;==============================================================================
; SECTION 5: NUMA-AWARE MEMORY ALLOCATION
;==============================================================================

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Titan_NumaAllocate - Allocate memory on specific NUMA node
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
Titan_NumaAllocate PROC FRAME size:QWORD, numaNode:DWORD, flags:DWORD
    LOCAL pMemory:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    sub rsp, 64
    
    mov rbx, size
    mov esi, numaNode
    mov edi, flags
    
    ; Validate size
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error_zero_size
    
    ; Check if NUMA aware allocation requested
    cmp edi, NUMA_POLICY_BIND
    je @@bind_allocation
    cmp edi, NUMA_POLICY_PREFERRED
    je @@preferred_allocation
    cmp edi, NUMA_POLICY_INTERLEAVE
    je @@interleave_allocation
    
    ; Default: standard allocation
    jmp @@standard_allocation
    
@@bind_allocation:
    ; Would use VirtualAllocExNuma or SetThreadAffinityMask + VirtualAlloc
    ; For now, fall through to standard
    
@@preferred_allocation:
@@interleave_allocation:
@@standard_allocation:
    ; Standard allocation
    mov rcx, rbx
    call malloc
    mov pMemory, rax
    
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_alloc
    
    ; Record allocation
    lock inc g_PerformanceCounters.totalMemoryAllocs
    
    mov rax, pMemory
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_zero_size:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_alloc:
    mov eax, ERROR_NOT_ENOUGH_MEMORY
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 64
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Titan_NumaAllocate ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Titan_NumaFree - Free NUMA-allocated memory
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
Titan_NumaFree PROC FRAME pMemory:QWORD
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    mov rbx, pMemory
    
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@done
    
    mov rcx, rbx
    call free
    
    lock inc g_PerformanceCounters.totalMemoryFrees
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
Titan_NumaFree ENDP

;==============================================================================
; SECTION 6: COMMAND BUFFER MANAGEMENT
;==============================================================================

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CommandBuffer_Create - Create GPU command buffer
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
CommandBuffer_Create PROC FRAME deviceId:DWORD, bufferType:DWORD, maxCommands:DWORD
    LOCAL pBuffer:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    sub rsp, 48
    
    mov ebx, deviceId
    mov esi, bufferType
    mov edi, maxCommands
    
    ; Allocate buffer
    mov ecx, sizeof CommandBuffer
    call malloc
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_alloc
    mov pBuffer, rax
    
    ; Zero initialize
    mov rcx, rax
    xor edx, edx
    mov r8d, sizeof CommandBuffer
    call memset
    
    ; Setup
    mov rax, pBuffer
    mov [rax].CommandBuffer.deviceId, ebx
    mov [rax].CommandBuffer.bufferType, esi
    mov [rax].CommandBuffer.maxCommands, edi
    
    ; Allocate command array
    mov ecx, edi
    imul ecx, 64                      ; 64 bytes per command
    call malloc
    test rax, rax
    jz @@error_cmd_alloc
    
    mov rdx, pBuffer
    mov [rdx].CommandBuffer.pCommands, rax
    
    mov rax, pBuffer
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_cmd_alloc:
    mov rcx, pBuffer
    call free
    
@@error_alloc:
    xor eax, eax
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 48
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
CommandBuffer_Create ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CommandBuffer_BeginRecording - Start recording commands
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
CommandBuffer_BeginRecording PROC FRAME pBuffer:QWORD
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    mov rbx, pBuffer
    
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error
    
    cmp [rbx].CommandBuffer.isRecording, 0
    jne @@error_already_recording
    
    mov [rbx].CommandBuffer.isRecording, 1
    mov [rbx].CommandBuffer.commandCount, 0
    mov [rbx].CommandBuffer.isExecutable, 0
    
    xor eax, eax
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_already_recording:
    mov eax, ERROR_BUSY
    jmp @@done
    
@@error:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
CommandBuffer_BeginRecording ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CommandBuffer_EndRecording - Finish recording, make executable
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
CommandBuffer_EndRecording PROC FRAME pBuffer:QWORD
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    mov rbx, pBuffer
    
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error
    
    cmp [rbx].CommandBuffer.isRecording, 0
    je @@error_not_recording
    
    mov [rbx].CommandBuffer.isRecording, 0
    mov [rbx].CommandBuffer.isExecutable, 1
    
    xor eax, eax
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_not_recording:
    mov eax, ERROR_NOT_READY
    jmp @@done
    
@@error:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
CommandBuffer_EndRecording ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CommandBuffer_Submit - Submit command buffer to GPU
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
CommandBuffer_Submit PROC FRAME pBuffer:QWORD, pWaitPrimitive:QWORD, pSignalPrimitive:QWORD
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    sub rsp, 48
    
    mov rbx, pBuffer
    mov rsi, pWaitPrimitive
    mov rdi, pSignalPrimitive
    
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@error
    
    cmp [rbx].CommandBuffer.isExecutable, 0
    je @@error_not_executable
    
    ; Record submit time
    call PerformanceCounter_GetTimestampNs
    mov [rbx].CommandBuffer.submitTimeNs, rax
    
    ; Would submit to actual GPU here
    
    ; Store signal primitive
    mov [rbx].CommandBuffer.signalPrimitive, rdi
    
    mov [rbx].CommandBuffer.isSubmitted, 1
    
    xor eax, eax
    jmp @@done
    
@@error_not_executable:
    mov eax, ERROR_NOT_READY
    jmp @@done
    
@@error:
    mov eax, ERROR_INVALID_HANDLE
    
@@done:
    add rsp, 48
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
CommandBuffer_Submit ENDP

;==============================================================================
; SECTION 7: UTILITY FUNCTIONS
;==============================================================================

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; AtomicIncrement - Thread-safe increment
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
AtomicIncrement PROC FRAME pValue:QWORD
    mov rax, pValue
    lock inc QWORD PTR [rax]
    ret
AtomicIncrement ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; GetTimestamp - Get QPC timestamp
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
GetTimestamp PROC FRAME
    push rcx
    sub rsp, 8
    
    lea rcx, [rsp + 16]               ; Return space
    call QueryPerformanceCounter
    
    mov rax, [rsp + 16]
    
    add rsp, 8
    pop rcx
    ret
GetTimestamp ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; memset - Fill memory
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
memset PROC FRAME pDest:QWORD, value:DWORD, count:QWORD
    push rdi
    
    mov rdi, pDest
    mov eax, value
    mov rcx, count
    
    rep stosb
    
    pop rdi
    ret
memset ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; memcpy - Copy memory
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
memcpy PROC FRAME pDest:QWORD, pSrc:QWORD, count:QWORD
    push rsi
    push rdi
    
    mov rdi, pDest
    mov rsi, pSrc
    mov rcx, count
    
    rep movsb
    
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    ret
memcpy ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; malloc - Allocate memory
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
malloc PROC FRAME size:QWORD
    mov rcx, size
    call HeapAlloc, GetProcessHeap(), 0, rcx
    ret
malloc ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; free - Free memory
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
free PROC FRAME ptr:QWORD
    test ptr, ptr
    jz @@done
    
    mov rcx, ptr
    call HeapFree, GetProcessHeap(), 0, rcx
    
@@done:
    ret
free ENDP

; SECTION 8: INITIALIZATION
;==============================================================================

; Titan_InitializeExpanded - Initialize expanded GPU/DMA subsystem

align 16
Titan_InitializeExpanded PROC FRAME
    push rbx

    ; Would call GetLogicalProcessorInformationEx here
    
    xor eax, eax                      ; Success
    
    add rsp, 32
    pop rbx
    ret
Titan_InitializeExpanded ENDP

;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Titan_ShutdownExpanded - Cleanup expanded subsystem
;------------------------------------------------------------------------------
align 16
Titan_ShutdownExpanded PROC FRAME
    push rbx
    sub rsp, 32
    
    ; Cleanup scheduler
    mov rax, g_pMultiGPUScheduler
    test rax, rax
    jz @@skip_scheduler

@@skip_scheduler:
